title: Autonomy
description: The level of independence, discretion and accountability for results in your role.
comment: I excel at working independently and taking ownership of my work, but I also value collaboration and seek input from others when needed.

title: Influence
description: The reach and impact of your decisions and actions, both within and outside the organisation.
comment: I am able to influence outcomes and drive change within and beyond my immediate team by building effective relationships with stakeholders at all levels.

title: Complexity
description: The range and intricacy of tasks and responsibilities that come with your role.
comment: I thrive in complex environments, effectively breaking down multifaceted problems into manageable parts and developing robust solutions.

title: Knowledge
description: The depth and breadth of understanding required to perform and influence work effectively.
comment: I maintain a strong professional foundation, continuously applying updated knowledge and best practices to solve complex problems.

title: Collaboration
description: Working effectively with others, sharing resources and coordinating efforts to achieve shared objectives.
comment: I work effectively with others by sharing resources and coordinating efforts to achieve shared objectives while valuing diverse perspectives.

title: Communication
description: Exchanging information, ideas and insights clearly to enable mutual understanding and cooperation.
comment: I communicate effectively both verbally and in writing, using active listening to ensure mutual understanding.

title: Improvement mindset
description: Continuously identifying opportunities to refine work practices, processes, products, or services for greater efficiency and impact.
comment: I constantly seek to improve work practices and processes by challenging the status quo and proposing innovative ideas.

title: Creativity
description: Generating and applying innovative ideas to enhance processes, solve problems and drive organisational success.
comment: I generate creative solutions to complex problems by thinking outside the box and taking calculated risks.

title: Decision-making
description: Applying critical thinking to evaluate options, assess risks and select the most appropriate course of action.
comment: I apply critical thinking to evaluate options and risks, ensuring informed decisions that account for potential consequences.

title: Digital mindset
description: Embracing and effectively using digital tools and technologies to enhance performance and productivity.
comment: I am comfortable with digital tools and technologies and strive to use them effectively to enhance my performance and productivity.

title: Leadership
description: Guiding and influencing individuals or teams to align actions with strategic goals and drive positive outcomes.
comment: I guide and influence others towards common goals by leading by example and inspiring peak performance.

title: Learning and development
description: Continuously acquiring new knowledge and skills to enhance personal and organisational performance.
comment: I am committed to continuous professional growth, actively applying new skills to improve performance and drive organisational success.

title: Planning
description: Taking a systematic approach to organising tasks, resources and timelines to meet defined goals.
comment: I take a systematic approach to organising tasks and timelines, ensuring effective prioritisation and time management.

title: Problem-solving
description: Analysing challenges, applying logical methods and developing effective solutions to overcome obstacles.
comment: I logically analyse challenges to develop effective solutions, demonstrating persistence when tackling difficult obstacles.

title: Adaptability
description: Adjusting to change and persisting through challenges at personal, team and organisational levels.
comment: I adjust to change and persist through challenges with flexibility and resilience in the face of uncertainty.

title: Security, privacy and ethics
description: Ensuring the protection of sensitive information, upholding privacy of data and individuals, and demonstrating ethical conduct within and outside the organisation.
comment: I maintain the highest standards of security, privacy, and ethics while ensuring sensitive information is rigorously protected.
